articles.title: Family of Stephenson King Jr., the man killed by Boston police officer now charged with manslaughter, demands transparency
articles.description:
King was shot and killed by a Boston police officer in March. During a press conference on Thursday, his family called for the release of body-camera footage.

The post Family of Stephenson King Jr., the man killed by Boston police officer now charged with manslaughter, demands transparency appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston police officer charged with manslaughter for shooting Stephenson King Jr. in March.
King's family demands release of body-camera footage during press conference on April 9.
Transparency in police actions is crucial for community trust and accountability in Boston.

articles.title: Her first marathon is for her dad and grandfather — lifelong South Boston residents
articles.description:
"It feels incredibly special to run for the city that has truly given my family everything we know."

The post Her first marathon is for her dad and grandfather — lifelong South Boston residents appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Olivia Dennett runs her first marathon in honor of her father and grandfather.
Both her father and grandfather are lifelong residents of South Boston.
The marathon highlights the strong community ties in South Boston.

articles.title: She’s running Boston for her mom and cancer research
articles.description:
Sophie Goad is running the 2026 Boston Marathon for the Dana-Farber Cancer Institute.

The post She’s running Boston for her mom and cancer research appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Sophie Goad is running the 2026 Boston Marathon to honor her mother.
She is raising funds for the Dana-Farber Cancer Institute.
Her efforts aim to support cancer research benefiting Boston residents.

articles.title: Jaylen Brown says underwater training with a surfing legend helped him deal with anxiety
articles.description:
"The worst thing you can do is panic. That's in the water, but that's also in life."

The post Jaylen Brown says underwater training with a surfing legend helped him deal with anxiety appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jaylen Brown credits underwater training with Laird Hamilton for managing anxiety.
Brown emphasizes the importance of staying calm in both water and life situations.
Local athletes may adopt similar techniques to enhance mental health and performance.

articles.title: Melania Trump delivers statement at White House denying ties to Epstein and knowledge of his crimes
articles.description:
The first lady also called on Congress to hold a public hearing centered on survivors of Epstein’s crimes, with a chance to testify before lawmakers and have their stories entered into the congressional record.

The post Melania Trump delivers statement at White House denying ties to Epstein and knowledge of his crimes appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Melania Trump denies any ties to Jeffrey Epstein during a White House statement.
She urges Congress to hold public hearings for Epstein's crime survivors to testify.
Boston residents may see increased attention on survivor support and legislative action.
